title: 有馬記念の後に・誇りのウマ娘

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week conquers her biggest rival and is
crowned the Arima Kinen champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's greeted with cheers from the crowd and
praise from Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week caps her victory by giving me a
heartfelt show of gratitude.
